Careers

Join the team behind Ugly Monday. Share your experience, tell us what role interests you, and send us your CV or portfolio link.

Work With Us

Ugly Monday is a modern Vietnamese cafe built around hospitality, consistency, and everyday ritual. We care about service, craft, and the feeling guests take with them after every visit.

What to Include

Tell us about the role you're interested in, your availability, your relevant experience, and a link to your CV, resume, or portfolio if you have one.
